nasb.text: Therefore, thus says the Lord God, ‘Because all of you have become dross, therefore, behold, I am going to gather you into the midst of Jerusalem.

esv.text: Therefore thus says the Lord God: Because you have all become dross, therefore, behold, I will gather you into the midst of Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 因此，主耶和華這樣說：‘你們既然都成了渣滓，所以，我要把你們集合在耶路撒冷城中。

ccb.text: 所以主耶和华说，‘你们既是渣滓，我要把你们聚集在耶路撒冷城。
